arts.ttl: Trainer predicts big English offer for player – Liverpool’s Arne Slot ‘already fascinated’ by him
arts.sum: Two days ago, La Gazette du Fennec reported Liverpool manager Arne Slot is ‘already fascinated’ by Feyenoord’s Anis Hadj-Moussa. It was also stated Slot has included the 22-year-old in his target list for Liverpool, after wanting to manage him at the Eredivisie side. At the end of last season, the manager left Feyenoord for Liverpool. arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Real Madrid 'abandon' Alexander-Arnold transfer
arts.sum: Real Madrid will ‘abandon’ their hopes of signing Liverpool right-back Trent Alexander-Arnold, according to reports. Real Madrid have now informed Liverpool of their desire to sign Alexander-Arnold, according to talkSPORT .

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Liverpool – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United welcome Liverpool to St James’ Park in the Premier League on Wednesday night. Eddie Howe will demand a response from his inconsistent side after dropped points to struggling West Ham and Crystal Palace over the past week. arts.ttl: Icon believes Liverpool man is on course for national team stardom – Arne Slot magic helps him fulfil his promise
arts.sum: Ryan Gravenberch is on course to become the Netherlands most important player, thanks to the work Arne Slot has done with him at Liverpool. That’s according to Dutch icon Ruud Gullit, who has sung the midfielder’s praises to De Telegraaf in his column for the paper today.
